activation_policy: activate for full paper route or when object repetition risk exists
completion_gate: S06ObjectGranularity validates object/variable coverage, cards, cross maps, granularity/load budgets, explanation ladders, repetition checks, unresolved objects, and S07/S08/S10 handoffs without new claims or final prose
purpose: Design complete object and mechanism-variable representation, granularity progression, section/load budgets, explanation ladders, and downstream handoffs without adding claims or drafting prose.

escalate_to_double_when: new object family or granularity ladder is introduced
subagent_lane_policy.rationale: Object/granularity design is reusable control material; single production is enough unless it changes multi-section semantics.

stage_quality_contract.active_profile_source: S05 reader spine plus S04 claim boundaries

checks: objects and variables are defined at usable granularity
method/evaluation depth cannot collapse to vague prose
visual/formal nodes are available for S08
no unsupported abstraction level is introduced

downstream_design_force: S10 method/evaluation must define objects and variables
S11 figures/tables know objects and relations

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: core method object or variable undefined
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: granularity too shallow to support method/evaluation
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local trace, label, or wording defect that does not alter authority
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: potential reviewer risk tracked without forced full rerun

stage_quality_contract.anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH findings enter local revision or risk ledger; they do not force full downstream rerun by default.
